a day to night transition scene where the sun begins near the upper left area of the sky and travels across the scene along a smooth circular arc path, gradually descending and setting near the bottom right horizon. During this motion the sky slowly transitions from bright daytime blue to deep dark blue and finally almost black to represent night. After the sun sets, the moon appears from the upper left region and follows a similar curved arc path across the sky toward the bottom right side, where it remains visible and emits a soft glowing light. Several clouds are placed at different vertical and horizontal positions across the sky so they are not aligned, and all clouds slowly drift from left to right throughout the animation. As the sky becomes dark, many small stars appear gradually across the sky, distributed unevenly to look natural, and they softly twinkle in a continuous looping glow. At the bottom of the scene a wide horizontal rectangle represents grass; its color transitions from bright green during daytime to very dark green as the sky changes from blue to night.

Light beige background. In the center, a simple stick figure made from basic shapes: a vertical dark grey rectangle for the body (parent), a circle for the head on top, two thin rectangles for arms attached to the upper body, and two rectangles for legs at the bottom. Total duration 4 seconds. 0–0.5s: Whole figure scales from 0% to 100% and fades in at the center. 0.5–2.5s: Body stays in place while legs alternate a small walk-in-place (each leg rotating forward then back around the hip), and arms swing opposite to the legs, all moving relative to the body. 2.5–4s: Figure stops walking, right arm waves three times by rotating at the shoulder while the rest of the body, head, and legs remain still in the center

White background. In the center of the screen, three rounded rectangles (cards) are arranged in a horizontal row with equal gaps: left card ‘Product’, middle card ‘Sale’, right card ‘Profit’. Each card is 260px wide, 140px tall, light grey (#F5F5F5) with a subtle shadow and 12px corner radius. Text labels are centered inside each card in dark grey (#333333), 28pt bold. Total canvas 1920×1080px, total duration 6 seconds. 0–1s: All three cards fade in from 0% to 100% opacity while sliding up slightly from below (y=60% to y=50%), easing out. 1–3s: Cards stay still, fully visible. 3–6s: The ‘Profit’ card in the right position scales smoothly from 1.0 to 1.5 size and gets a highlighted border (4px solid blue #2196F3) while remaining centered in place. At the same time, the ‘Product’ card slides left out of the frame and the ‘Sale’ card slides right out of the frame over these last 3 seconds, both fading to 0% opacity as they exit. The animation ends with only the enlarged, highlighted ‘Profit’ card in the center of the screen.
